/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/gatzk_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o -o gatzk_tests   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/sbsa-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/sbsa-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda-13.0/targets/sbsa-linux/lib libgatzkml.a /home/pzh/project/third_party/mcl/lib/libmcl.a /usr/local/cuda-13.0/targets/sbsa-linux/lib/libcudart.so -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
